\section{Introduction}
This document tests \textbf{bold text} and \emph{emphasized text}.

\subsection{Nested Commands}
Here is \textbf{\emph{bold and italic}} text together.

% This is a comment
Regular text after comment.

\begin{itemize}
First item in the list.

Second item in the list.
\end{itemize}

\section{Mathematics}
Inline math $x^2$ in a sentence.

\begin{equation}
a^2 + b^2 = c^2
\end{equation}

\subsection{References}
